title: AutoFish for Tic
description: Allow AutoFish for Forge to use Tinkers' Construct fishing rods.
body:
This mod does one simple thing:

Allow [AutoFish for Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/autofish-for-forge) to use [Tinkers' Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct) fishing rods.

Enjoy autofishing with tinker's fishing rods!
